name: Quelites (Greens with Pinto Beans)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup canned pinto beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the spinach several times to ensure all sand and grit are removed.
2. Steam the greens in a tightly covered pot until wilted. Drain the greens and finely chop them.
3. Heat oil over medium heat in a large skillet. Add garlic and green onions, stirring frequently, until the onions are soft (about 2 to 3 minutes).
4. Stir in the chopped greens, pinto beans, and chili powder. Cover and cook over low heat for 5 minutes or until heated through.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve. Makes 6 servings.
